sweep_provenance: Manual seed sweep, 21 June 2026, via Claude web_fetch of Domain listing pages (page-read extension access was unavailable; portal alert feed not yet populated). Prices are agents' guides; re-verify before any action.
target_area: Inner West incl. Drummoyne north of Victoria Rd (decision #15).

listings.description: Top-floor apartment in the waterfront 'Tarrawonga' community with superb water views across the bay to Cockatoo Island; north/NE aspect with excellent natural light. Features list Water Views and Area Views.

outlook.basis: Top-floor unit with water views across the bay to Cockatoo Island; listed feature 'Water Views'.

listings.description: Top-floor apartment in 'The Drummoyne' (17 residences) with northeast outlooks to the water, the Sydney city skyline and the Harbour Bridge; serene elevation and private aspect.

outlook.basis: Top floor with NE outlook to water, city skyline and Harbour Bridge.

listings.description: Top-floor corner apartment with distant water views and leafy garden surrounds; resort-style complex with pool; short stroll to Darling Street cafes, waterfront parklands and express transport. Feature list includes Water Views and Swimming Pool.

outlook.basis: Top-floor corner with distant water views; listed feature 'Water Views'.

listings.description: Elevated apartment with far-reaching district vistas panning to the iconic Sydney city skyline; open-plan with relaxed balcony. Large 180 m2 internal.

outlook.basis: Elevated, far-reaching district vistas to the Sydney city skyline.

listings.description: Oversized garden-level apartment in the 'Waterdale' complex with private LEVEL ENTRY, a courtyard and large wraparound terrace; house-like living with apartment convenience near-bayside. Listed features include 'Lift Installed' and below-ground swimming pool. Large 176 m2.

outlook.basis: Garden-level with courtyard/terrace beside communal gardens; near-bayside but not elevated.

listings.description: North-facing penthouse in 'Mezzo' overlooking Wentworth Park, capturing stunning city views while enjoying suburb tranquility. Listed features include Park-facing North aspect, City Views and Water Views. Penthouse (floor 10) - lift present but confirm. No price guide published; confirm it sits within budget.

outlook.basis: North aspect overlooking Wentworth Park; also city and water views per feature list.

listings.description: Seventh-floor apartment with sweeping water views and abundant light; open-plan living flowing to a generous balcony; pool and gym in complex. Going to auction - no guide published, confirm within budget.

outlook.basis: Seventh floor with expansive sweeping water views; listed feature 'Water Views'.

listings.description: Oversized luxury residence in 'The Bayswater' (one of only eight) overlooking the greenery of Drummoyne Oval and Taplin Park and the boat-filled waters of Five Dock Bay; wrap-around indoor/outdoor entertaining. Very large 273 m2. Auction Sat 27 Jun - no guide; large/luxury, confirm within budget.

outlook.basis: Overlooks Five Dock Bay waters plus Drummoyne Oval/Taplin Park greenery.

listings.description: Balmain apartment, auction guide $1.8M (lightly profiled in this seed pass - full description, size and outlook to be enriched on the next sweep).
Drummoyne apartment, 162 m2 (lightly profiled in this seed pass - full description, price and outlook to be enriched on the next sweep).
